description_long: This hammer features a large, ornate head constructed from faceted, translucent purple crystals, with several sharp, angular protrusions radiating from the central mass. The head is reinforced by a metallic, gold-edged frame that adds both structural support and decorative flair. At the center of the head, a prominent, vertically oriented crystal spike is set, mirrored by a similar crystal at the base of the head. The handle is straight, dark brown, and appears to be wrapped for grip, with gold and purple accents at the base. Small floating crystal shards surround the head, enhancing its magical or fantastical appearance. The overall design suggests a ceremonial or enchanted tool rather than a standard utilitarian hammer.
description: A large, ornate hammer with a faceted purple crystal head, gold-edged metallic frame, and a wrapped straight handle. Floating crystal shards and decorative accents give it a magical, ceremonial look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the crystal head, central vertical crystal, and symmetrical gold-edged frame.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the head, the layered crystal structure, and the handle's cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the back face of the crystal head and the gold-edged frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and angularity of the crystal head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle wrapped with a textured, dark grip and accented with gold and purple rings at the base.
attribute_head_type: Large, double-sided sledge-type head made of faceted purple crystal, with angular protrusions and a central vertical crystal spike, reinforced by a gold-edged metallic frame.
